sqlMap.select: select * from PublicPrivateOfferingSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey, ClientNamePpo, ClientIndustryPpoKey, ServiceIndustryPpoKey, YearServiceRenderedPpo, SizeOfOfferingPpo, FeesChargedPpo, TypeOfOfferingPpo, ClientIndustryPpoKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryPpoKeyOthers, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from PublicPrivateOfferingSupp where PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey = #PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey#
sqlMap.update:
update PublicPrivateOfferingSupp set
ClientNamePpo = #ClientNamePpo# ClientNamePpo = null ClientIndustryPpoKey = #ClientIndustryPpoKey# ClientIndustryPpoKey = null ServiceIndustryPpoKey = #ServiceIndustryPpoKey# ServiceIndustryPpoKey = null YearServiceRenderedPpo = #YearServiceRenderedPpo# YearServiceRenderedPpo = null SizeOfOfferingPpo = #SizeOfOfferingPpo# SizeOfOfferingPpo = null FeesChargedPpo = #FeesChargedPpo# FeesChargedPpo = null TypeOfOfferingPpo = #TypeOfOfferingPpo# TypeOfOfferingPpo = null ClientIndustryPpoKeyOthers = #ClientIndustryPpoKeyOthers# ClientIndustryPpoKeyOthers = null ServiceIndustryPpoKeyOthers = #ServiceIndustryPpoKeyOthers# ServiceIndustryPpoKeyOthers = null VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# VersionSequence = null PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# PolicyKey = null
where PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey = #PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from PublicPrivateOfferingSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey, ClientNamePpo, ClientIndustryPpoKey, ServiceIndustryPpoKey, YearServiceRenderedPpo, SizeOfOfferingPpo, FeesChargedPpo, TypeOfOfferingPpo, ClientIndustryPpoKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryPpoKeyOthers, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from PublicPrivateOfferingSupp where PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey = #PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey#

select PublicPrivateOfferingsSuppKey, ClientNamePpo, ClientIndustryPpoKey, ServiceIndustryPpoKey, YearServiceRenderedPpo, SizeOfOfferingPpo, FeesChargedPpo, TypeOfOfferingPpo, ClientIndustryPpoKeyOthers, ServiceIndustryPpoKeyOthers from PublicPrivateOfferingSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
